texto: Doesn't everyone sell his soul? I tell you, sir: the devil does not exist, there is no devil, yet I sold him my soul. That is what I am afraid of. To whom did I sell it? That is what I am afraid of, my dear sir: we sell our souls, only there is no buyer.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de João Guimarães Rosa que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Doesn't everyone sell his soul? I tell you, sir: the devil does not exist, there is no devil, yet…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, devil, selling-your-soul, com foco em selling-your-soul.
